use_cases: User authentication with toggle between login and signup modes
Split-screen landing pages with hero content and auth form
SaaS and web application entry points
ai_summary: A split-screen login and signup form component featuring a gradient hero section on the left with marketing copy, and a clean authentication form on the right. Includes toggle between login/signup modes and password visibility toggle. Uses a dark blue-to-orange gradient color scheme with modern, minimal styling suitable for SaaS and web applications.
